description: Silver coloured steel case with a fixed bezel for durability, style and comfortStainless steel strap with a press clasp crystal embellishments on the strap and bezelSilver dial with silver coloured handsmiss sixty logo across the middle of the watchScrew to reset timeSolid case back for enhanced durabilityWater resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to use it even when washing hands or light rainWarranty: 2 years
